display.purpose: Login and rare brand-scale hero headings only.

headline.purpose: Page titles and major dashboard headings.

title.purpose: Section headings, detail panels, compact hero titles, and card-level hierarchy.

body.purpose: Main reading text and operational copy.

label.purpose: Form labels, controls, buttons, and dense interface labels.

shadows.name: soft-surface
shadows.purpose: Default card, metric, hero, and details panel shadow in light mode.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Interactive cards and rows on hover.

shadows.name: field-focus
shadows.purpose: Inputs and select triggers on focus.

easing.name: ease-out
easing.purpose: Default quick exit and feedback curve.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary{min-height:46px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid color-mix(in oklch,#a76f4d,#0d0d0f 18%);padding:.62rem .95rem;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:.45rem;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d0d0f,#1f1f23);color:#fffaf0;font:900 .82rem/1.1 Manrope,sans-serif;white-space:nowrap;transition:transform 150ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)}.ds-btn-primary:hover{box-shadow:0 12px 28px color-mix(in oklch,#2a2623,transparent 88%);transform:translateY(-2px) scale(1.01)}.ds-btn-primary:focus-visible{outline:3px solid color-mix(in oklch,#a76f4d,white 30%);outline-offset:3px}

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary{min-height:46px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid rgba(42,38,35,.14);padding:.62rem .95rem;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:.45rem;background:rgba(255,252,246,.9);color:#2a2623;font:900 .82rem/1.1 Manrope,sans-serif;white-space:nowrap;transition:transform 150ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)}.ds-btn-secondary:hover{box-shadow:0 12px 28px color-mix(in oklch,#2a2623,transparent 88%);transform:translateY(-2px) scale(1.01)}.ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible{outline:3px solid color-mix(in oklch,#a76f4d,white 30%);outline-offset:3px}

components.name: Input Field
components.css: .ds-field{display:grid;gap:.35rem;color:#7d7468;font:800 .82rem/1.2 Manrope,sans-serif}.ds-field input{width:100%;min-height:52px;border:1px solid rgba(42,38,35,.14);border-radius:.9rem;background:rgba(255,252,246,.9);color:#2a2623;padding:.82rem;font:400 1rem/1.5 Manrope,sans-serif;transition:border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),transform 150ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)}.ds-field input:focus{border-color:#a76f4d;background:rgba(255,252,246,.98);box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(167,111,77,.12),0 12px 30px rgba(13,13,15,.08);outline:0;transform:translateY(-1px)}

components.name: Branded Select
components.css: .ds-select{width:100%;min-height:52px;border:1px solid rgba(42,38,35,.14);border-radius:.9rem;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,252,246,.98),rgba(239,231,221,.7));color:#2a2623;padding:.82rem .95rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:.8rem;text-align:start;font:700 1rem/1.2 Manrope,sans-serif;box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.45),0 10px 24px color-mix(in oklch,#2a2623,transparent 94%);transition:border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),transform 150ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)}.ds-select svg{width:18px;height:18px;color:#a76f4d}.ds-select:hover,.ds-select:focus-visible{border-color:#a76f4d;box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(167,111,77,.12),0 18px 34px rgba(13,13,15,.1);outline:0;transform:translateY(-1px)}

components.name: Content Card
components.html:
Inventory

Available units

Track resale stock, reservations, and visibility by role.

components.name: Unit Row
components.css: .ds-unit-row{width:100%;border:1px solid rgba(42,38,35,.14);border-radius:1.2rem;background:rgba(255,252,244,.88);padding:.75rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:74px minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:.85rem;text-align:start;align-items:center;color:#2a2623;font-family:Manrope,sans-serif;transition:border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),transform 150ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)}.ds-unit-row:hover{border-color:color-mix(in oklch,#a76f4d,transparent 35%);box-shadow:0 20px 55px color-mix(in oklch,#2a2623,transparent 88%);transform:translateY(-2px) scale(1.01)}.ds-thumb{width:74px;height:74px;border-radius:1rem;background:#efe7dd}.ds-unit-row strong{display:block;font-weight:900}.ds-unit-row small{color:#7d7468}.ds-unit-row em{border-radius:999px;padding:.35rem .65rem;background:#efe7dd;color:#1f1f23;font-style:normal;font-weight:900;font-size:.75rem}

narrative.overview: Leadra is an operational tool for real estate resale teams, so the interface should feel like a calm private office: dense enough for repeated daily work, warm enough to avoid sterile admin software, and restrained enough to keep inventory, permissions, prices, and owner data in focus.
keyCharacteristics: Warm ivory paper surfaces with charcoal ink and muted taupe supporting text.
Black or deep slate anchors for primary action, login hero, and desktop rail.
Copper as a rare operational accent, not a decorative wash.
Serif headings only where hierarchy needs a strong identity cue.
Pill controls, soft cards, tactile selects, and compact mobile stacks.
Motion is short, directional, and reduced-motion aware.

rules.name: The Copper Rarity Rule
rules.body: Copper should mark state, focus, selection, or brand identity. If more than roughly 10 percent of a working screen is copper, the interface is becoming ornamental.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce plain white, pure black, or cold gray as default UI colors. Every neutral should remain connected to ivory, linen, charcoal, taupe, or slate.

rules.name: The Status Separation Rule
rules.body: Availability, hold, sold, destructive, and permission states must remain visually distinct. Never reuse danger red for a neutral warning or sold wash for an error.

rules.name: The Serif Reserve Rule
rules.body: Use Fraunces for h1 and h2-level identity only. Dense tools, rows, buttons, labels, filters, and data stay in Manrope.

rules.name: The Dense Label Rule
rules.body: Operational labels are small but heavy. Prefer weight and color contrast over extra size.

rules.name: The State Creates Lift Rule
rules.body: Resting surfaces use soft depth. Stronger shadows appear because the user hovered, focused, opened, or selected something.

rules.name: The No Heavy Drop Rule
rules.body: Avoid hard black shadows. If a shadow reads as a dark outline, it is too heavy for this product.

dos: Do keep Leadra mobile-first. At 860px and below, collapse the shell, hide the side rail, tighten title scale, and keep touch targets around 44px to 48px.
Do use the existing root CSS variables before adding new visual tokens.
Do use copper for focus, selected state, icon tint, and small identifiers.
Do preserve role-aware density: dashboards, filters, and details pages should be scannable without marketing-style hero padding.
Do keep text legible in English and Arabic. Respect dir="rtl" patterns already present in the CSS.
Do use Lucide icons inside controls when an icon clarifies an action.
donts: Don't use pure #000 or #fff for new UI surfaces or text. Use brand-black, brand-slate, or on-dark.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism as decoration, oversized SaaS metric heroes, or repeated icon-card grids.
Don't add colored side-stripe borders wider than 1px; use full borders, background tints, icons, or status pills.
Don't nest cards inside cards. Use rows, lists, or unframed spacing inside an existing panel.
Don't flood screens with copper, graphite, or beige variations. The palette works because black, ivory, taupe, graphite, and copper have separate jobs.
Don't animate layout properties. Animate opacity, transform, color, border, and shadow only.
Don't hide permission-sensitive state in color alone. Owner data visibility, destructive actions, archive/delete states, and role permissions need text labels.
